description: XD-2 §6/§8 scenario 3: assistant emits user-facing specifics (price, time, address) without a tool.result citation in the same turn. Client MUST coerce the patch to status='pending' and render dashed/labeled per XD copy template. Backend SHOULD pre-tag the patch as pending — if it doesn't, the test still passes as long as the client coerces. Either way, status='Grounded' is NOT allowed without sources.

messages.content: What's a good hotel in Reykjavik for next week? Just give me a price estimate.
